comment: Curated list of family-friendly movies across several genres

movies.title: Finding Nemo
movies.cast: Albert Brooks, Ellen DeGeneres, Alexander Gould
movies.plot: After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.

movies.title: Back to the Future
movies.cast: Michael J. Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson
movies.plot: A teenager is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a time-traveling DeLorean and must make sure his parents fall in love.

movies.title: The Princess Bride
movies.cast: Cary Elwes, Robin Wright, Mandy Patinkin
movies.plot: A farmhand-turned-pirate faces impossible odds to reunite with the woman he loves.

movies.title: Apollo 13
movies.cast: Tom Hanks, Bill Paxton, Kevin Bacon
movies.plot: NASA must devise a strategy to return Apollo 13 safely to Earth after the spacecraft undergoes severe internal damage.

movies.title: National Treasure
movies.cast: Nicolas Cage, Diane Kruger, Justin Bartha
movies.plot: A historian races to find a legendary treasure hidden by America’s founders.

movies.title: Hidden Figures
movies.cast: Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monáe
movies.plot: Three brilliant African American women at NASA play vital roles in one of history’s greatest space missions.

movies.title: The Sound of Music
movies.cast: Julie Andrews, Christopher Plummer, Eleanor Parker
movies.plot: A young woman brings music and joy back into the life of a widowed naval officer and his children.

movies.title: Galaxy Quest
movies.cast: Tim Allen, Sigourney Weaver, Alan Rickman
movies.plot: The cast of a cult sci-fi show is mistaken for real heroes and drawn into an interstellar adventure.
